Best India to Italy Tour Package – Discover Art, History, and Romance

Beneath a sunlit sky streaked with history and la dolce vita, Italy unfolds as a canvas of timeless beauty—ancient ruins draped in vine-wrapped walls, cobalt seas crashing against pastel cliffs, and cobblestone lanes alive with opera echoes. The best India to Italy tour package begins here, blending culture, cuisine, and romance in every step. Guided by Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency, esteemed Best Tour Operator, and world-savvy Best International Tour Operator—each Italian reverie is choreographed to perfection. Opt for our Italy tour packages from India, elevate family adventures with the Best family tour packages, or entrust every romantic flourish to our Best honeymoon packages.

Why Choose an Italy Tour Package from India?

Rich Cultural Heritage and Timeless Architecture
From ancient Roman wonders to Renaissance masterpieces, Italy's heritage inspires awe. Our 7 days Italy tour package covers iconic landmarks from Rome to Florence with curated insights. Include local expert guides with background in art history to enhance your cultural immersion. For a broader European experience, explore our comprehensive India to Europe Tour package.

Direct Flights and Schengen Visa Assistance
Travelxploria’s Italy tour package from Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, and major cities includes complete visa support and flight arrangements. Add brief info about current visa processing timelines and trusted documentation tips to boost clarity.

Perfect for Honeymooners, Families, and History Enthusiasts
Whether you’re seeking India to Italy honeymoon tour package affordable options or planning a fun-filled family trip, our itineraries cater to every traveler. Explore romantic escapes in our honeymoon packages or plan memorable journeys with our tailored family tour packages.

Top India to Italy Tour Packages

7 to 10 Days Italy Tour Package from India – Rome, Venice, Florence & Milan
This best India to Italy tour package includes Rome’s historic sites, Venice’s canals, Florence’s art, and Milan’s modern edge. Ideal for first-time travelers. You could mention optional day trips to Pompeii or Lake Como.

Italy Honeymoon Packages for Indian Couples
Our India to Italy honeymoon tour package affordable plans feature romantic gondola rides, scenic countryside escapes, and couple-focused dining experiences. Consider including details like a spa experience in Tuscany or a candlelight dinner in Amalfi.

Budget-Friendly Italy Tour Packages from India
Explore affordable India to Italy tour package deals starting at INR 95,000 including major highlights, meals, and guided tours. Suggest budget tips such as using Italy’s regional trains and staying in boutique B&Bs. You may also want to see our solo travel packages for independent explorers.

Custom Italy Itineraries for Families and Group Tours
Flexible options such as Italy tour packages from Kolkata and Mumbai allow group-specific accommodations, child-friendly sightseeing, and cultural immersion. Include activity examples like gelato workshops or Roman gladiator school visits.

Must-Visit Places in Italy Covered in Tour Packages

Rome – Colosseum, Vatican City & Trevi Fountain
Our packages offer skip-the-line access to major landmarks, plus evening walking tours through Rome’s illuminated streets. Add museum highlights or special access features like Vatican early-entry tours.

Venice – Gondola Rides and Grand Canal
As part of our India to Italy tour package with Venice canal tour, enjoy a serene gondola experience under stone bridges and past grand Renaissance facades. Mention a specific Venice landmark like St. Mark's Basilica or the Rialto Bridge.

Florence – Renaissance Art and Architecture
Private access to the Uffizi Gallery and a guided tour of the Duomo await as part of the best India to Italy tour package. Suggest optional add-ons like artisan leather workshops or wine tasting in Chianti.

Milan – Fashion Capital and Duomo Cathedral
Take advantage of Milan’s blend of heritage and style with rooftop tours, La Scala visits, and shopping avenues. You might include a cultural tip about visiting Milan’s Brera Art Gallery or Navigli canals.

Pisa – Leaning Tower and Tuscan Countryside
Enjoy countryside picnics and wine tastings woven into your Italy tour package 5 days or longer. You could add that Pisa is often included as a day trip from Florence with convenient rail access.

What’s Included in the Best India to Italy Tour Packages?

Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
Packages including Italy tour packages from Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai, and Kolkata come with flights and airport transfers. Consider mentioning popular airline options for price and comfort.

Hotel Accommodation with Daily Breakfast
Stay in 3- to 5-star hotels with buffet breakfasts and scenic views. Add a tip on preferred neighborhoods in each city (e.g., Trastevere in Rome, Cannaregio in Venice).

Guided Tours, Entry Tickets & Inter-City Transfers
From Colosseum passes to Florence–Venice train tickets, we handle all logistics. Suggest the Eurail Pass or Italy’s high-speed train system for flexibility.

Schengen Visa Assistance and Travel Insurance
Visa help, insurance, and support documents included in every package. Recommend applying at least 4–6 weeks in advance to allow processing.

Best Time to Visit Italy from India

April to June – Ideal Weather and Fewer Crowds
Mild temperatures, spring blossoms, and cultural festivals abound. You might mention events like Rome’s birthday celebration or Florence’s Maggio Musicale.

September to October – Fall Colors and Wine Harvests
Stroll vineyards and dine al fresco in vibrant fall hues. Add tips for booking winery tours in Tuscany or Piedmont.

December to February – Winter Tours and Festive Atmosphere
Enjoy the best India to Italy winter tour package with Christmas markets, snowy Alps views, and cozy cafés. Mention Venice Carnival (Feb) or Rome's Piazza Navona market.

Frequently Asked Questions About India to Italy Tour Packages

How many days are ideal for an Italy trip from India?
We recommend a 7 days Italy tour package or a 10-day itinerary to comfortably explore key destinations. Mention if combining with another European country is feasible. Many travelers extend their trips with a norway tour package from india or a finland tour package from india.

Is a Schengen visa required for Indian travelers to Italy?
Yes. Our packages provide full support for Schengen visa applications. Consider providing a link or footnote to official embassy site.

What is the average cost of a tour package to Italy from India?
A 5 to 10-day Italy tour package cost ranges from INR 95,000 to INR 185,000, depending on customization and inclusions. Suggest budgeting tips like booking during shoulder season.

Do you offer India to Italy tour package with Venice canal tour?
Yes. This includes private gondola rides, historic walking tours, and canal-side dining as part of the romantic itinerary. Tip: Go for late evening rides for a quieter experience.

Can I book an India to Italy tour package with local cuisine experience?
Absolutely. Our packages include regional cooking classes, winery visits, and curated food tours across Florence, Tuscany, and Rome. Mention dietary accommodation options (vegetarian, Jain).

What is the best India to Italy winter tour package?
It includes Rome’s Christmas lights, Venice’s Carnival season, Alpine excursions, and cozy trattoria dinners in Tuscany. Consider adding info on Italy’s ski destinations (e.g., Cortina d'Ampezzo). For other European winter tours, consider our sweden tour packages from india or denmark tour package from india.

How to Book the Best India to Italy Tour Package

Top Indian Travel Agencies Offering Italy Packages
Travelxploria is your go-to provider for Italy tour packages from India with tailored service from cities like Kolkata, Delhi, Mumbai, and Bangalore. Include note on 24/7 support or WhatsApp assistance.

Online Booking Platforms and Early Bird Discounts
Take advantage of special deals when booking 60+ days in advance. Festive and off-season offers available. Mention refund/cancellation flexibility for peace of mind.

Required Documents and Travel Preparation Tips
Carry passport with 6-month validity, passport-sized photos, health insurance, and a universal adapter. Dress in layers and pack smart walking shoes. Suggest currency exchange options or eSIM cards.
For other fascinating destinations, check our uk tour packages from india, azerbaijan tour packages from india, or jordan tour packages from india for unique cultural journeys.
With Travelxploria’s best India to Italy tour package, live la dolce vita—whether you’re on a romantic escape, a family holiday, or a cultural deep dive. From Italy tour packages from Mumbai and Delhi to immersive Italy tour package 5 days and 7 days Italy tour package options, your Italian journey begins with us.

packages.overview:
• Begin your journey in Hungary’s vibrant capital.

  • Explore the iconic sights and rich history of Budapest.

  • Relax in one of Europe’s largest thermal baths.

  • Travel to Austria’s elegant and cultural capital.

  • Discover Vienna’s grand architecture and royal heritage.

  • Enjoy Vienna at your own pace.

  • Journey to the fairytale city of Prague.

  • Visit the historic Prague Castle complex.

  • Explore the UNESCO-listed medieval town.

  • Bid farewell with memories of Central Europe’s finest gems.

Arrive in Budapest, Hungary’s enchanting capital straddling the Danube River, where history and modern charm blend seamlessly. Upon arrival at the airport or station, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax or begin exploring the nearby surroundings. Whether it's strolling along the scenic banks of the Danube or discovering the grandeur of historic landmarks like the Parliament Building or Chain Bridge, Budapest welcomes you with its rich culture and warm hospitality. Your Central European journey begins in this captivating city known for its thermal baths, vibrant streets, and architectural wonders.

Buda Castle, Fisherman's Bastion, Matthias Church, and St. Stephen’s Basilica. A tour through the heart of Budapest lets you discover both the Buda and Pest sides of the city. The guide will walk you through key historical landmarks, such as the majestic Buda Castle, the stunning Fisherman's Bastion, and the iconic Matthias Church. You’ll also visit the beautiful St. Stephen’s Basilica in Pest, which is home to Hungary’s most revered relic.

Experience pure relaxation with a visit to the renowned Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of Europe’s largest and most iconic spa complexes. With your entrance ticket, step into a world of rejuvenation as you explore the beautifully designed neo-baroque architecture and soak in the mineral-rich thermal waters sourced from natural hot springs. Choose from a variety of indoor and outdoor pools, saunas, and steam rooms, perfect for unwinding after a day of sightseeing. Whether you're easing travel fatigue or simply indulging in wellness, the Széchenyi Spa offers a quintessential Budapest experience, blending history, health, and luxury in a truly unique setting.

Travel from Budapest to Vienna by train and enjoy a smooth and scenic ride through the heart of Central Europe. The journey takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours, offering comfortable seating and picturesque views of the countryside along the way. Departing from Budapest’s Keleti Railway Station, you’ll head west toward Austria’s sophisticated capital. Upon arrival at Vienna’s central station, make your way to your hotel and settle in. The rest of the day is free for you to begin exploring the elegant streets, grand palaces, and cultural richness that define Vienna, setting the tone for the next chapter of your journey.

Discover the elegance and imperial grandeur of Austria’s capital on a comprehensive Vienna city tour that includes entrance to the majestic Schönbrunn Palace. Begin by exploring Vienna’s most iconic landmarks such as the Ringstrasse, Hofburg Palace, St. Stephen’s Cathedral, and the Vienna State Opera, while learning about the city’s rich Habsburg history and cultural legacy. The highlight of the tour is a guided visit to Schönbrunn Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you’ll walk through opulent state rooms and beautifully maintained gardens. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and royal charm, showcasing Vienna’s timeless allure.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Vienna, a city that effortlessly blends imperial grandeur with vibrant modern culture. Take this opportunity to explore at your own pace—perhaps stroll through the charming streets of the Old Town, relax at a traditional Viennese café with a slice of Sachertorte, or visit one of the city’s many renowned museums or galleries. For nature lovers, the beautifully manicured gardens of Schönbrunn Palace or the Prater Park offer a peaceful escape. Whether indulging in local cuisine, shopping for souvenirs, or simply soaking in the city’s timeless charm, Vienna promises a relaxing and enriching experience.

Walk through the historic Castle District, where an expert guide will share fascinating stories about its royal past and architectural marvels. Visit the awe-inspiring St. Vitus Cathedral, a masterpiece of Gothic design, and wander along the charming Golden Lane, lined with colorful historic houses. This immersive tour provides a deeper understanding of Prague’s rich heritage, blending royalty, legend, and breathtaking scenery. With Travelxploria’s seamless service, this unforgettable journey offers the best way to experience Prague Castle’s splendor.

Just a short drive from Prague, embark on a magical day trip to Cesky Krumlov, a UNESCO World Heritage site, with the best on-ground support from Travelxploria. This fairy-tale town boasts a well-preserved medieval center, charming cobblestone streets, and a breathtaking castle overlooking the Vltava River. Stroll through its winding alleys, admire the picturesque architecture, and soak in the scenic river views. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, you’ll uncover the town’s rich history and enchanting beauty. This tour promises an unforgettable experience, making Cesky Krumlov a must-visit destination for history lovers and travelers seeking timeless charm.

packages.overview:
• Begin your European journey in Switzerland’s vibrant lakeside city.

  • Enjoy alpine adventures and explore the charming town of Lucerne.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel through the scenic Alps into Italy’s fashion capital.

  • Discover the elegance and serenity of Lake Como.

  • Arrive in the enchanting city of canals.

  • Experience Venice’s magic from the water.

  • Travel to the Renaissance heart of Italy.

  • Explore Tuscany’s most iconic gems.

  • Head to the Eternal City filled with ancient wonders.

  • Walk through Rome’s legendary ruins.

  • Discover masterpieces of art and spirituality.

  • Say goodbye with memories of a lifetime.

Upon arrival at Zurich International Airport, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax and recover from your journey. If time allows, head out to explore the city’s charming old town, stylish boutiques, or enjoy a peaceful stroll along Lake Zurich. From its medieval architecture to its modern urban flair, Zurich offers a perfect blend of culture, history, and natural beauty, making it an ideal starting point for your European adventure.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Zurich, giving you the perfect opportunity to explore this sophisticated Swiss city at your own pace. Begin your day with a relaxed breakfast, then consider wandering through the charming Altstadt (Old Town), where cobbled streets, historic buildings, and boutique shops create a picturesque atmosphere. Stroll along Bahnhofstrasse, one of the world’s most exclusive shopping avenues, or relax by the serene shores of Lake Zurich. You may also choose to visit museums, such as the Swiss National Museum, or take a short hike up Uetliberg Mountain for panoramic city views. The day is yours to unwind and discover.

Travel comfortably to this iconic destination, renowned for its stunning scenery, elegant villas, and charming lakeside towns. Explore the picturesque town of Como, stroll along its quaint streets, and visit the magnificent cathedral. Enjoy a scenic boat ride on the lake, passing through beautiful towns like Bellagio or Varenna. Capture postcard-perfect views of the lake and surrounding mountains. After a day immersed in natural beauty and serene elegance, return to Milan with unforgettable memories of this idyllic retreat.

Embark on an unforgettable Tuscan adventure with Travelxploria, your gateway to Italy’s most enchanting landscapes. Join our expert Travelxploria guide and best on-ground support staff as you explore the historic gems of Pisa, Siena, San Gimignano, and Chianti in a single breathtaking day. Capture the perfect photo at the Leaning Tower of Pisa, stroll through the medieval streets of Siena, and admire the grandeur of its famous Piazza del Campo. Lose yourself in the fairytale charm of San Gimignano, known for its ancient towers and artisan shops, before indulging in the rich flavors of Chianti’s world-renowned wines. From stunning architecture to rolling vineyard-covered hills, every moment is a feast for the senses. Travel from Florence to Rome aboard a high-speed train, enjoying a swift and scenic ride through the picturesque landscapes of Tuscany and Lazio. The journey takes approximately 1.5 hours, offering a comfortable and efficient way to transition from the artistic treasures of Florence to the timeless grandeur of Rome. Relax in your seat as you pass rolling hills, vineyards, and charming Italian towns. Upon arrival at Rome Termini Station, transfer to your hotel and settle in. Use the rest of the day to start exploring the Eternal City, rich with ancient ruins, Renaissance architecture, and vibrant local culture around every corner.

packages.package_name: European Grand Tour: From Historic Streets to Modern Sights
packages.overview:
• Arrive in the dynamic British capital and settle into your hotel.

  • Explore iconic landmarks and enjoy panoramic views from the London Eye.

  • Visit two of London’s historic and architectural treasures.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris via Eurostar.

  • Discover Parisian highlights with a river cruise and Eiffel Tower visit.

  • Admire masterpieces at the world-renowned Louvre Museum.

  • Travel to the sunny French Riviera and check in to your Nice hotel.

  • Enjoy a scenic tour of glamorous coastal towns like Cannes and Monaco.

  • Cross into Italy with a beautiful train journey to Milan.

  • Explore the fashion capital’s historic and cultural landmarks.

  • Say goodbye to Europe with lasting memories of your incredible journey.

Arrive in the vibrant city of London, a captivating blend of royal heritage, modern sophistication, and timeless charm. Upon arrival at the airport, you’ll be warmly welcomed by a representative who will assist with your transfer to the hotel. After check-in, take some time to relax and recover from your journey. If time permits, step out for a leisurely stroll to get your first glimpse of this iconic city—perhaps catch a view of Big Ben or enjoy a cozy café nearby. Your unforgettable European adventure begins in one of the world’s most iconic capitals.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

packages.overview:
• France – Stroll along the Champs-Élysées in Paris, admire the Eiffel Tower, visit the Louvre Museum, and enjoy the romance of the Seine River. Explore the scenic French Riviera with its glamorous beaches and historic towns like Nice and Monaco.
  • Switzerland – Experience the breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss Alps, visit the stunning cities of Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and take a scenic ride on the Glacier Express. Don’t miss the Jungfraujoch, the Matterhorn, and Lake Geneva for a picture-perfect Swiss adventure.
  • Italy – Discover the Eternal City of Rome, home to the Colosseum, Vatican City, and the Trevi Fountain. Explore the artistic wonders of Florence, the romance of Venice, and the stunning coastal beauty of Amalfi and Cinque Terre. Indulge in authentic Italian cuisine and world-class wines.
  • Austria – Immerse yourself in the imperial grandeur of Vienna, with visits to Schönbrunn Palace and St. Stephen’s Cathedral. Experience the musical charm of Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Hallstatt and Innsbruck in the Austrian Alps.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Today, we’ll travel to Switzerland. Upon arrival in Geneva, we’ll pass by the Palace of Nations (the European headquarters of the United Nations) and explore the pretty English Garden with its flower clock and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe.




After lunch, we’ll continue our journey through Switzerland, traveling along the scenic routes by Lake Geneva and Lake Neuchâtel. We’ll drive along the Three Lakes region, enjoying views of magnificent vineyards set against the mountain backdrop. We’ll stop in Neuchâtel, where you can enjoy a walk by the lake, explore the historic town center, or visit the beautiful 10th-century castle. Our journey will conclude in Zurich, where we’ll arrive in the late afternoon.

With our guide, we’ll explore Zurich, the most populous city in Switzerland, and its financial and cultural heart. Known for its banks, Zurich has been twice recognized as the city with the best quality of life in the world. Afterwards, we’ll embark on a scenic cruise of nearly two hours on Lake Zurich, with brief stops to enjoy the charming villages along the route. We’ll disembark in Rapperswil, a picturesque village renowned for its medieval castle. We’ll return to Zurich by train, providing an opportunity to experience the efficiency and punctuality of the Swiss railway system.

Step into the heart of Zurich’s history and beauty with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel partner. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will take you on a seamless exploration of the city’s most iconic landmarks. Stroll along the prestigious Bahnhofstrasse, wander through the charming Old Town, and marvel at the Swiss National Museum and the Zurich Opera House, each brimming with culture and history. Then, transition from land to water on a scenic Lake Zurich cruise, soaking in panoramic views of the city skyline and Swiss Alps. This perfectly curated tour blends culture, history, and breathtaking scenery, ensuring unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every journey is crafted to be the best.

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

to Vienna","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Salzburg","to":"Vienna","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":1300,"h_name":"ibis Wien Mariahilf","h_country":"Austria","h_city":"Vienna","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/ibis Wien Mariahilf/1744111008226-0796_ho_00_p_1024x768.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/ibis Wien Mariahilf/1744111008392-hotel-ibis.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/ibis Wien Mariahilf/1744111008397-leonardo-1114316-0796_ho_05_p_3000x2250_O-130807.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":823,"h_name":"MOXY VIENNA CITY EAST","h_country":"Austria","h_city":"Vienna","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/MOXY VIENNA CITY EAST/1741603656137-2024-11-13 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/MOXY VIENNA CITY EAST/1741603656205-2024-11-13 (2).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/MOXY VIENNA CITY EAST/1741603656209-2024-11-13 (1).jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":1299,"h_name":"Hotel Sans Souci Wien","h_country":"Austria","h_city":"Vienna","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/Hotel Sans Souci Wien/1744110817426-images (57).jpeg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/Hotel Sans Souci Wien/1744110817426-89476115.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Vienna/Hotel Sans Souci Wien/1744110817544-sans-souci-wien_master-suite_c_gregor-titze-1120x540.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Vienna City Tour","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As you enjoy your final breakfast of this unforgettable journey, take a moment to cherish the incredible memories you’ve made along the way. From breathtaking landscapes to rich cultural experiences, every moment has been a treasure. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any final arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable departure. Though our adventure together comes to an end, the experiences, friendships, and stories will stay with you forever.

packages.overview:
• France – Wander through the romantic streets of Paris, marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame, and visit the historic charm of Rouen.
  • United Kingdom – Experience the royal grandeur of London, explore the medieval beauty of Durham, admire Edinburgh’s castles, and soak in the vibrant culture of Glasgow, Liverpool, and Dublin.
  • Netherlands – Discover the picturesque canals and rich artistic heritage of Amsterdam, home to Van Gogh Museum and Anne Frank House.
  • Belgium – Stroll through the medieval squares of Brussels and Bruges, and indulge in world-famous Belgian chocolates and waffles.
  • Germany – Explore the historic sites of Berlin, the fairytale castles of Bavaria, and the cultural vibrance of Frankfurt and Cologne.
  • Switzerland – Witness the Swiss Alps’ breathtaking beauty, visit Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and enjoy a scenic ride on the Glacier Express.
  • Italy – Step back in time with the Colosseum in Rome, explore the romantic canals of Venice, admire Florence’s Renaissance art, and relax on the stunning coastline of Amalfi.
  • Spain – Immerse in the artistic and architectural wonders of Barcelona and Madrid, experience the passion of flamenco in Seville, and soak up the sun in Costa del Sol.
  • Austria – Enjoy the imperial beauty of Vienna, the musical heritage of Salzburg, and the stunning landscapes of Innsbruck.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Rome","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171054-istockphoto-501396596-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171175-istockphoto-508540910-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171236-istockphoto-539115110-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Rome","day_summary":"

Welcome to Rome! As you arrive in the Eternal City, our Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. After you’ve settled in, our guide will personally meet you, sharing essential details about your journey ahead. You can also find helpful information at the hotel reception. In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, a perfect introduction to Rome’s vibrant atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets and explore a variety of restaurants, setting the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome Fiumicino Airport","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Florence","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1747246882990-AdobeStock_260554885-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289621-istockphoto-1088920100-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289665-istockphoto-1136673014-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Rome to Florence","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

We’ll depart Venice and make our way to Austria. Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to explore the historic town center and enjoy lunch. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey through the beautiful Tyrolean landscapes as we cross into Switzerland, arriving in Zurich.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Venice","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Zurich to Lucerne to Zurich","day_summary":"

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Paris","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976316-istockphoto-689710224-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976390-istockphoto-135034702-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976428-istockphoto-847408280-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741635794864-AdobeStock_730104594-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Strasbourgh to Paris","day_summary":"

We’ll depart from Zurich and travel to the French region of Alsace, where we’ll visit its capital, Strasbourg a charming city that beautifully blends French and German influences. You’ll have time to explore and get to know the city. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey to Paris, arriving in the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Zurich","to":"Paris","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":681,"h_name":"Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie","h_country":"France","h_city":"Paris","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535200-5175-11-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535319-5175-16-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535355-unnamed (43).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Paris City Tour","day_summary":"

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise Experience","day_summary":"

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it’s time to bid farewell to this incredible journey. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any last-minute needs, ensuring a smooth departure. As you reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from historic landmarks to breathtaking landscapes, we hope you take home not just souvenirs, but cherished memories that will last a lifetime. Though this adventure comes to an end, the stories and moments shared will stay with you forever.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Paris","to":"Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Germany – Explore the grandeur of Berlin’s Brandenburg Gate, the fairytale Neuschwanstein Castle, and the historic charm of Munich and Frankfurt.
  • Austria – Discover Vienna’s Schönbrunn Palace, the music-filled streets of Salzburg, and the picturesque beauty of Innsbruck in the heart of the Alps.
  • Czech Republic – Walk through the cobbled streets of Prague, marvel at Charles Bridge and Prague Castle, and soak in the old-world charm of this medieval capital.
  • Hungary – Enjoy the elegance of Budapest, with its stunning Parliament Building, Buda Castle, and relaxing thermal baths.
  • Poland – Visit the historic streets of Kraków and Warsaw, experience the poignant history of Auschwitz, and admire the beauty of Wrocław’s market square.
  • Slovakia – Explore the Bratislava Castle, walk along the Danube River, and discover the medieval charm of Slovakia’s capital.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome Fiumicino Airport","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

packages.package_name: Grand European Odyssey: Castles, Coasts & Culture
packages.overview:
Spain: The Land of Passion & Heritage

1. Madrid – The Spanish Capital of Art & Culture

  • Explore the world-famous Prado Museum, home to masterpieces by Goya and Velázquez.

  • Visit the majestic Royal Palace of Madrid, the largest royal palace in Europe.

  • Stroll through Plaza Mayor and enjoy traditional Spanish tapas.

  • Admire the lively atmosphere at Puerta del Sol, Madrid’s bustling square.

2. Barcelona – Gaudí’s Masterpiece

  • Marvel at the Sagrada Familia, Antoni Gaudí’s architectural wonder.

  • Wander through Park Güell, a colorful, surreal park full of artistic mosaics.

  • Walk along the famous La Rambla, lined with street performers and markets.

  • Visit the Gothic Quarter, filled with medieval history and charming cafes.

3. Seville – The Heart of Andalusia

  • Watch an authentic Flamenco performance in the historic Triana district.

  • Visit the stunning Alcázar of Seville, a blend of Moorish and Spanish architecture.

  • Walk through Plaza de España, an iconic landmark with stunning bridges and canals.

  • Explore the Seville Cathedral and climb the Giralda Tower for panoramic views.

Austria: The Land of Imperial Majesty & Music

4. Vienna – The City of Music & Royalty

  • Visit the opulent Schönbrunn Palace, the summer residence of the Habsburgs.

  • Experience classical music at the Vienna State Opera.

  • Explore the Hofburg Palace, once the center of the Austrian Empire.

  • Stroll through St. Stephen’s Cathedral and the historic city center.

5. Salzburg – Mozart’s Birthplace & Alpine Beauty

  • Discover the stunning Hohensalzburg Fortress, overlooking the city.

  • Visit Mirabell Palace & Gardens, featured in The Sound of Music.

  • Explore Mozart’s Birthplace, a must-visit for music lovers.

  • Enjoy breathtaking views of the Austrian Alps.

In the morning, we´ll embark on a tour of the City of Counts. This vibrant city, nestled along the Mediterranean Sea, is famous for Gaudi’s modernist architecture, the bustling Ramblas, and its rich history, highlighted by the Universal Exposition and the Olympics hosted here. Barcelona is renowned as one of the most beautiful and fascinating European capitals. In the evening, we’ll leave Barcelona and travel north into Catalonia. Before settling into our hotel, we’ll take a walk in Girona, exploring its historic center, known for its colorful houses, the old Jewish quarter, and its impressive cathedral.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Barcelona","to":"Girona","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":817,"h_name":"Best Western Premier CMC Girona","h_country":"Spain","h_city":"Girona","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Girona/Best Western Premier CMC Girona/1741601791908-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154612.198.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Girona/Best Western Premier CMC Girona/1741601791977-triplesupletoria_01-min.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Girona/Best Western Premier CMC Girona/1741601792016-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154553.069.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Chambéry","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/package/Chambéry/1744874678438-ChambÃ©ry.jpg"},{"path":"/package/Chambéry/1744874678514-ChambÃ©ry 1.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Girona to Chambery","day_summary":"

We’ll head to France, traveling through the Provence region. Our first stop will be Arles, a small UNESCO World Heritage city known for its connections to Van Gogh. Here, we can visit the Roman theater and quaint Romanesque churches. There will be time to explore and have lunch. Next, we’ll include a visit to Carrières des Lumières, an incredible underground art experience featuring a captivating display of art, images, and sound in an ancient quarry. We’ll arrive in Chambery, the charming capital of Savoy, for the evening, a medieval style city with beautiful historic center and large castle.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Girona","to":"Chambéry","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":818,"h_name":"Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry","h_country":"France","h_city":"Chambéry","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995652-2024-10-18.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995756-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154914.538.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995762-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154907.457.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Leysin","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/package/Leysin/1744874728567-Leysin.jpg"},{"path":"/package/Leysin/1744874728642-Leysin 1.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Chambéry to Leysin","day_summary":"

We’ll journey to Switzerland, arriving in Geneva. With our guide, we’ll go to Palais des Nations (headquarters of the United Nations in Europe), and we’ll see the beautiful English Garden with its flower clock, and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe. Our next stop will be the charming, walled village of Gruyères, world-renowned for its cheese. Nearby, there are some of Switzerland´s major chocolate factories, including Nestlé. Our tour includes admission to the Maison Cailler Chocolate Factory, where you’ll enjoy a sweet tasting experience.

We’ll continue our journey along scenic roads, passing through bucolic mountain landscapes and picturesque wooden villages, until we reach Chillon Castle, built on the shores of Lake Geneva (admission included). We’ll arrive in Leysin by mid-afternoon, a charming holiday village with spectacular views of the Rhône Valley and Mont Blanc. Leysin is well-known for its winter sports resort and hiking options. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Chambéry","to":"Leysin","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":819,"h_name":"Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Leysin","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263067-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155357.715.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263177-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155350.941.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263183-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155341.110.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Leysin to Zurich","day_summary":"

We’ll experience stunning mountain scenery today, so be sure to pack your winter clothes. We’ll ascend to Glacier 3000 by cable car ride, one of the most spectacular spots in Switzerland featuring ice and snow year-round, and where you can walk on the suspended bridge between two mountain peaks, explore the Ice Cathedral, or enjoy the Fun Park. We’ll stop in Interlaken for lunch before traveling to Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. In the evening, we’ll arrive in Zurich, with some time to explore the center before heading to the hotel.

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Milan","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.


In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

packages.package_name: Greece to Italy Timeless Cities and Seaside Wonders
packages.overview:
• Athens

    • Acropolis of Athens: Home to the iconic Parthenon, a symbol of Ancient Greece.

    • Temple of Olympian Zeus: One of the largest temples of ancient Greece, located in the heart of Athens.

    • Plaka District: A charming neighborhood filled with traditional Greek houses, cafes, and shops.

    • National Archaeological Museum: Displays some of the most important ancient artifacts of Greek civilization.

  • Santorini

    • Oia Village: Famous for its whitewashed buildings, blue domes, and stunning sunsets over the Aegean Sea.

    • Fira Town: The island's bustling capital with shops, restaurants, and cliffside views.

    • Red Beach: A dramatic beach with red sand and crystal-clear waters.

    • Akrotiri Archaeological Site: An ancient Minoan settlement destroyed by a volcanic eruption.

  • Mykonos

    • Mykonos Town (Chora): Known for its narrow streets, whitewashed buildings, and vibrant nightlife.

    • Paradise Beach: A lively beach known for its beach clubs, bars, and parties.

    • Delos Island: A UNESCO World Heritage Site, known for its ancient ruins and historical significance.

    • Little Venice: A picturesque area in Mykonos Town with buildings right on the water.

  • Crete

    • Knossos Palace: The largest archaeological site of Minoan civilization.

    • Elafonissi Beach: Famous for its pink sand and clear waters.

    • Samaria Gorge: A popular hiking destination in the White Mountains, offering stunning views and natural beauty.

    • Heraklion Archaeological Museum: A museum showcasing Minoan artifacts from Crete.

Italy

  • Rome

    • Colosseum: The ancient amphitheater where gladiators once fought, one of the greatest symbols of Ancient Rome.

    • Vatican City: The smallest country in the world, home to the Pope and the famous St. Peter's Basilica and Sistine Chapel.

    • Roman Forum: The ruins of ancient government buildings and temples at the heart of ancient Rome.

    • Pantheon: A well-preserved ancient Roman temple with a stunning dome.

    • Trevi Fountain: A baroque masterpiece and one of the largest fountains in Rome.

  • Florence

    • Duomo di Firenze: The iconic cathedral with a stunning dome designed by Brunelleschi.

    • Uffizi Gallery: Home to world-famous artworks, including pieces by Botticelli, Michelangelo, and Leonardo da Vinci.

    • Ponte Vecchio: A historic bridge lined with shops selling jewelry, art, and souvenirs.

    • Piazza della Signoria: A lively square with Renaissance sculptures, including a replica of Michelangelo’s David.

  • Venice

    • St. Mark's Basilica: A stunning example of Byzantine architecture with golden mosaics.

    • Rialto Bridge: A famous bridge spanning the Grand Canal, lined with shops.

    • Gondola Ride: A romantic boat ride through the canals of Venice.

    • Doge’s Palace: A gothic-style palace once home to the Venetian rulers.

  • Milan

    • Duomo di Milano: A gothic cathedral, one of the largest in the world.

    • The Last Supper: Leonardo da Vinci’s famous painting housed in the Convent of Santa Maria delle Grazie.

    • Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II: An elegant shopping gallery, home to luxury stores and restaurants.

    • Sforza Castle: A historic fortress with museums and art collections.

  • Amalfi Coast

    • Positano: A picturesque cliffside town with colorful buildings and stunning beaches.

    • Ravello: Famous for its beautiful villas, including Villa Cimbrone and Villa Rufolo.

    • Amalfi Town: Known for its historical cathedral and lovely coastal scenery.

    • Capri Island: A glamorous island with upscale shopping, beaches, and the Blue Grotto.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Athens International Airport","to":"Athens","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":797,"h_name":"Novotel Athenes","h_country":"Greece","h_city":"Athens","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Athens/Novotel Athenes/1741591952144-2023-10-28.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Athens/Novotel Athenes/1741591952290-unnamed - 2025-03-10T130155.862.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Athens/Novotel Athenes/1741591952296-unnamed - 2025-03-10T130152.329.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Athens city tour ","day_summary":"

We´ll embark on a city tour of Athens with a local guide, visiting landmarks such as the Presidential Mansion, the Panathenaic Stadium where the first modern Olympic Games were held, the National Library, and the bustling squares of the city center. We´ll also explore the newer neighborhoods that developed after the 2004 Olympic Games. The tour will conclude at the Acropolis (admission not included). In the evening, we´ll provide a transfer to the historical neighborhood of Plaka, renowned for its charming Greek tavernas and opportunities to immerse yourself in the rich folklore of this country.



","day_element":[{"type":"activity","rowData":{"a_id":547,"a_name":"Athens City Tour","a_type":"","a_country":"Greece","a_city":"Athens","a_inclusions":"","a_exclusions":"","a_cancellation":"","a_start_time":"","a_d_hours":"","a_d_mins":"","cur_code":"","adult_price":"","child_price":"[]","a_images":null,"a_details":"

Experience the best of ancient and modern Athens on this comprehensive guided tour with Travelxploria's expert guides. Begin at Syntagma Square, the heart of the city, where history and modern life blend seamlessly. Visit the Temple of Olympian Zeus, one of the largest temples of the ancient world, and marvel at its towering columns. Explore the National Archaeological Museum, home to an extensive collection of Greek artifacts, sculptures, and treasures from antiquity. With Travelxploria’s knowledgeable experts, gain deep insights into Athens’ rich heritage, architectural wonders, and vibrant culture, making this tour a perfect introduction to the city’s timeless charm.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Athens\"]","inserted_id":"[547]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071494-istockphoto-537367193-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071581-istockphoto-961163194-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071663-istockphoto-1055006202-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071709-istockphoto-1318598305-612x612.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Athens/Athens City Tour/1740744071792-istockphoto-1141586781-612x612.jpg\"}]"}}]}]},{"city":"Patras","country":"Greece","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Athens to Patras ","day_summary":"

We’ll travel to the Peloponnese, making a brief stop at the Corinth Canal, an impressive engineering marvel from the late nineteenth century. Continuing through the mountains, we’ll reach Tripoli, the capital of the Arcadia region. Here, we’ll take a break to explore the bustling Aeros Square, known for its cafes and restaurants. Our journey will then take us to Olympia, where we’ll visit the Archaeological Site with a local guide (tickets included). The first Olympic Games were held here in 776 B.C., attracting athletes from all over Greece and its colonies. Highlights of the site include the Temple of Zeus, the Stadium, the Gymnasium, and the Arena. Next, we’ll proceed to Patras, the third largest city in Greece, with a remarkable medieval fortress and the largest cathedral in the country. Adjacent to the cathedral is the small church of St. Andrew, a significant place of pilgrimage. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Athens","to":"Patras","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":806,"h_name":"MY WAY HOTEL & EVENTS","h_country":"Greece","h_city":"Patras","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Patras/MY WAY HOTEL & EVENTS/1741595114514-tsakanikas-39.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Patras/MY WAY HOTEL & EVENTS/1741595114630-2021-10-03.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Patras/MY WAY HOTEL & EVENTS/1741595114635-tsakanikas-52.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Brindisi","country":"Italy","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Visiting Brindisi","day_summary":"

After breakfast, we’ll cross the Rio–Antirrio Bridge, a spectacular suspension bridge that connects the Peloponnese with the Greek mainland. We’ll travel through the regions of Central Greece and Epirus. Upon arrival in Igoumenitsa, a port town, there will be time for a stroll before boarding the modern ferry at 02:00 p.m. to sail across the Ionian Sea to Italy. We’ll reach Brindisi by the end of the day, around 09:00 p.m., where we’ll spend the night.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Patras","to":"Brindisi","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":809,"h_name":"Hotel Palazzo Virgilio","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Brindisi","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Brindisi/Hotel Palazzo Virgilio/1741596511894-unnamed - 2025-03-10T141800.879.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Brindisi/Hotel Palazzo Virgilio/1741596511962-2021-06-17.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Brindisi/Hotel Palazzo Virgilio/1741596512000-20230203_202250.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Naples","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Naples/1741006399356-istockphoto-1472480600-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Naples/1741006399452-istockphoto-1168218716-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Naples/1741006399500-istockphoto-527072683-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"To Naples ","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll visit two extraordinary and authentic towns. Our first stop will be Alberobello, famous for its unique conical-shaped houses known as trulli. These distinctive structures, with their stacked stone roofs, are a UNESCO World Heritage Site and represent a remarkable example of Italian rural architecture. Next, we’ll head to Matera, located in the Basilicata region, renowned for its ancient historic center and the Sassi di Matera—a complex of ancient dwellings and buildings carved into the rock, dating back thousands of years. Not only is it a World Heritage Site, but also one of the oldest continuously inhabited human settlements in the world. In the afternoon, after enjoying an included lunch in Matera, we’ll continue our journey through Basilicata and Campania, taking in the beautiful mountain landscapes. We’ll arrive in Naples by evening, where you’ll have free time to explore.

After breakfast, we´ll head to the port in Naples to board a boat to the Island of Capri, where you can choose to take a boat to Grotta Bianca or the funicular to Capri city. After lunch, we’ll reboard and head to Sorrento, a charming tourist town nestled at the base of a cliff, where you’ll have free time to wander. Our journey will then take us to the Gulf of Salerno, where we’ll stay in the city of Salerno.
