We’ll journey to the south of the boot, marveling at the stunning southern Italian scenery as we cross the Cilento National Park. We’ll arrive in Paola, located on the shores of the Tyrrhenian Sea, where we’ll visit the Sanctuary of St. Francis of Paola and enjoy free time for lunch in its charming historic center. Our adventure will then take us to Villa San Giovanni, where we’ll board a short ferry crossing to the island of Sicily. Upon arrival in Messina, we’ll have time to stroll around the cathedral. Finally, we’ll continue to Taormina. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Salerno","to":"Taormina","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":814,"h_name":"Hotel Caesar Palace","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Taormina","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Taormina/Hotel Caesar Palace/1741600871794-20241012_185438.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Taormina/Hotel Caesar Palace/1741600871933-unnamed - 2025-03-10T153041.383.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Taormina/Hotel Caesar Palace/1741600871933-AACaesarPalace_Pool10.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Palermo","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Palermo/1744968563379-AdobeStock_173801533.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Palermo/1744968564203-AdobeStock_263632183.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Onto Palermo ","day_summary":"

Nestled at the foot of Mount Etna, the beautiful city of Taormina was once described by Churchill as the most beautiful place on earth. You’ll have time to explore the vibrant old town, where the Greek theater is set against the breathtaking landscape. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey toward the center of the island. Our next stop will be Caltagirone, a UNESCO World Heritage Site known for its impressive Baroque architecture. You’ll get to ride a little tourist train (included), where you’ll learn about the city and its key landmarks. Caltagirone is also the ceramic capital of Sicily, as seen in its numerous shops, workshops, and iconic sites, including the famous 142-step staircase, each step uniquely decorated with colorful tiles. After lunch, you’ll tour Villa Romana del Casale with a local guide (admission and tour included), another UNESCO World Heritage Site. In the Roman Empire, villas were symbols of agricultural wealth, and Villa del Casale is exceptional not only for its well-preserved 4th-century architecture but also for its stunning mosaics, which adorn almost every room, considered the finest in the Roman world. We’ll then cross the island’s mountainous interior and continue to Palermo, arriving by the end of the day. Dinner will be included. 

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Taormina","to":"Palermo","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":813,"h_name":"ASTORIA PALACE HOTEL ","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Palermo","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Palermo/ASTORIA PALACE HOTEL /1741596753859-IMG20230106163114.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Palermo/ASTORIA PALACE HOTEL /1741596753964-unnamed - 2025-03-10T142205.817.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Palermo/ASTORIA PALACE HOTEL /1741596753968-unnamed - 2025-03-10T142200.137.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Palermo city tour ","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll embark on a guided city tour of Palermo with a local expert. Highlights include the cathedral, famous for its blend of architectural styles and royal tombs (admission included), and the Palazzo dei Normanni, a former royal palace with fountains, markets, and gardens. We’ll also visit Monreale to see its cathedral , a UNESCO World Heritage Site celebrated for its breathtaking golden mosaics that adorn the entire interior. The afternoon is yours to enjoy at your leisure.

We’ll include a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. From our bus, we’ll immerse ourselves in this city, an open-air museum filled with sights like the Colosseum, the Roman Forum, and its iconic basilicas, where every corner tells a story. Our tour will conclude in Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums. The afternoon will be free.

At the end of the day, we’ll include a transfer to Trastevere, a lively neighborhood known for its charming, traditional restaurants.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable European adventure, starting in Paris, where you'll explore the Eiffel Tower, Versailles, and enjoy the city by night. Continue to Brussels, visiting Mini-Europe, then head to Amsterdam for its canals, museums, and vibrant neighborhoods. Explore Heidelberg, the Black Forest, and the Rhine Falls in Germany, followed by a journey to Jungfraujoch and Interlaken in Switzerland. Discover the Alpine charm of Innsbruck and the charming city of Ljubljana. In Italy, explore the magic of Venice, the Postojna Caves, and the wonders of Florence and Pisa, before ending your journey in Rome with visits to iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and Vatican City. Finally, fly back home, filled with memories from your European dream tour.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast before embarking on a guided city tour of Paris, led by our expert Travelxploria representative and guide. Explore iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. Ascend to the 3rd Level of the Eiffel Tower, offering a stunning panoramic view of Paris. After a delightful lunch, visit the magnificent Palace of Versailles, a masterpiece of 17th-century French artistry. Later, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, passing Notre Dame, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, followed by the enchanting Paris by Night tour. End your perfect day with a sumptuous dinner. Overnight stay in Paris with Travelxploria – the best travel agency.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Amsterdam","country":"Netherlands","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630270-istockphoto-1768484817-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630372-istockphoto-937057490-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Netherlands/Amsterdam/1741006630429-istockphoto-615718444-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":" Brussels: A Journey Through Europe in Miniature ","day_summary":"

Today, embark on an exciting journey to Brussels, the vibrant capital of Belgium and the headquarters of the European Union. Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative will guide you to the iconic Grand Place, one of Europe's most stunning squares, where you’ll admire the medieval Town Hall and the famous Manneken Pis statue. Next, experience the charm of Mini-Europe, a fascinating miniature park showcasing over 350 meticulously crafted European landmarks. Witness the architectural marvels of the continent in a single visit, brought to life in exquisite detail. After a day of exploration and discovery, relax with an overnight stay in the Netherlands, enjoying a delightful spread of breakfast, lunch, and dinner

Join your Travelxploria representative and expert tour guide for an incredible journey through Germany’s historic Heidelberg, the enchanting Black Forest, and Switzerland’s breathtaking Rhine Falls. Start your day exploring Heidelberg Altstadt, a picturesque old town nestled along the Neckar River, with its medieval charm and the iconic Heidelberg Castle towering above. Stroll through cobblestone streets and visit the stunning Church of the Holy Spirit. Next, venture into the heart of the Black Forest, where you’ll be captivated by its lush landscapes and charming villages. Experience a live demonstration of traditional cuckoo clock craftsmanship, a true Black Forest specialty. Later, travel to Schaffhausen to witness the mighty Rhine Falls, Europe’s largest waterfall, where cascading waters create a mesmerizing spectacle. After a day of exploration, unwind at your hotel in Central Switzerland. Travelxploria, the best travel agency, ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Overnight stay with Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner.

A Majestic Alpine Experience Enjoy the tour’s crowning jewel with Travelxploria the best travel agency as we take you on an enchanting alpine adventure to Jungfraujoch, \"The Top of Europe,\" paired with the breathtaking beauty of Interlaken. After a delightful breakfast, journey to Interlaken, a picturesque Swiss town nestled between two stunning lakes, offering spectacular mountain views. After breakfast, check out and join your Travelxploria guide for a journey to Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, explore the city's iconic landmarks, including the Duomo, the Campanile, and the Baptistery with its famed Gates of Paradise. Wander through Piazza della Signoria, home to Renaissance sculptures, and admire the Ponte Vecchio, a historic bridge spanning the Arno River. After a captivating day in Florence, we head to Pisa to see the famous Leaning Tower and the Square of Miracles. With Travelxploria as your trusted agency, this day is sure to be unforgettable. Enjoy breakfast, lunch, and dinner as part of your journey.

Begin with a visit to Vatican City, the world’s smallest country, and explore the Vatican Museums, home to classical sculptures and Renaissance masterpieces. Marvel at the Sistine Chapel’s \"Last Judgment\" by Michelangelo and visit St. Peter’s Basilica, a true architectural marvel. Afterward, enjoy an orientation tour of Rome, taking in the Colosseum, the iconic Trevi Fountain, and other renowned landmarks. Enjoy a delightful lunch in the heart of Rome before continuing your tour. End the day with a hearty dinner before heading back to your hotel. With Travelxploria, experience Italy at its finest.

packages.overview:
• Louvre Museum: Home to the world-renowned Mona Lisa and other masterpieces.
  • Notre-Dame Cathedral: Gothic cathedral, a masterpiece of architecture.
  • Champs-Élysées & Arc de Triomphe: Iconic avenue and historical monument.
  • The largest ancient amphitheater, known for gladiatorial contests.
  • Visit St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel, home to Michelangelo’s famous ceiling.
  • An ancient temple turned church with stunning architecture.
  • Toss a coin into the famous Baroque fountain for good luck.
  • The museum where Anne Frank and her family hid during WWII.
  •  Explore Amsterdam’s picturesque canals.
  •  Scenic views and boat rides on the lake in Zurich
  • Explore the glittering world of Swarovski crystals.
  • Florence Cathedral Known for its stunning dome designed by Brunelleschi.
  • Piazza della Signoria: A historic square with statues and fountains.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let Travelxploria’s expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara.

packages.package_name: European Odyssey Exploring Iconic Landmarks and Hidden Gems
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let our expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary

Today, get ready for breathtaking scenery and a once-in-a-lifetime experience with an exhilarating journey to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters, exclusively organized by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Ascend the majestic peak using various cable cars, including the Rotair, the world’s first revolving cable car, offering unrestricted 360-degree views of the dazzling snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine white snowfields, dotted with massive ice boulders. At the summit, dare to walk across the famous Cliff Walk, the highest suspension bridge in Europe, for an adrenaline-pumping experience with spectacular panoramic views. Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. Visit the historic Lion Monument and stroll across the iconic Kapellbrücke (Chapel Bridge). Enjoy some leisure time shopping for renowned Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates. To conclude the day, relax on a scenic cruise across the stunning Lake Lucerne, surrounded by picturesque alpine landscapes. Return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria has curated the perfect Swiss adventure for you

ENJOY GONDOLA RIDE","day_summary":"

 After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara

This morning, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with Travelxploria – the best travel agency ensuring a seamless experience. Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, take a walking tour through this historic city, immersing yourself in its rich culture and artistic heritage. Marvel at Florence’s most iconic landmark – the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, home to the famed Gates of Paradise. Stroll through the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air museum filled with stunning Renaissance sculptures, surrounded by historic cafés, and dominated by the majestic Palazzo Vecchio. Walk across the renowned Ponte Vecchio, the ancient bridge spanning the Arno River, lined with charming shops and boutiques. Later, continue your journey to Pisa, where you will visit the Square of Miracles, home to the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Admire the awe-inspiring architecture of this stupendous monument, a true marvel of medieval engineering. After an enriching day of history and culture, proceed to your hotel for a relaxing evening. Overnight stay at the hotel in the Tuscany region

packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

​After a delightful breakfast, set out on an exhilarating city tour with your Travelxploria representative and expert guide, ensuring a seamless experience. Explore London’s most iconic landmarks, including Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Trafalgar Square, and the majestic Tower Bridge. Witness the grandeur of Buckingham Palace and, if lucky, experience the iconic Changing of the Guard ceremony. Cricket enthusiasts will relish an exclusive visit to Lord’s Cricket Ground, delving into its rich history, the Pavilion, and the legendary Ashes Urn, followed by a delicious lunch at this historic venue. Later, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views from the London Eye, offering a spectacular perspective of the city skyline and the River Thames. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Witness the grandeur of Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, the iconic Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. ","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Magical Day at Disneyland & Enchanting Paris","day_summary":"

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before venturing into the wonders of Disneyland Paris. Choose between two captivating parks—Disney Park, where fairy tales come to life with thrilling rides, vibrant parades, and beloved Disney characters, or Walt Disney Studios Park, offering breathtaking stunt shows and behind-the-scenes movie magic. After a delicious lunch, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, gliding past Paris’ most iconic landmarks. As night falls, embark on the enchanting Paris by Night tour, witnessing the illuminated Eiffel Tower, Notre-Dame, and Champs-Élysées. End this magical day with a sumptuous dinner before retiring to your hotel. Overnight stay in Paris.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Heidelberg, where the charming Old Town (Altstadt) awaits. Wander through its cobblestone streets, admire historic houses, and visit the iconic Church of the Holy Spirit, all set beneath the grandeur of Heidelberg Castle. Next, immerse yourself in the beauty of the Black Forest, known for its rolling hills and traditional villages. Witness a fascinating cuckoo clock-making demonstration, a hallmark of Black Forest craftsmanship. Later, journey to Switzerland to marvel at the mighty Rhine Falls, where a thrilling boat ride brings you close to Europe’s largest waterfall. As the day winds down, check in to your hotel in Central Switzerland and savor a delicious dinner before resting for the night.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Bus","from":"Frankfurt","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Jungfraujoch & Interlaken – A Swiss Alpine Dream","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey to Interlaken, a charming Swiss town nestled between the stunning Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, offering breathtaking alpine views. Stroll through its quaint streets, soak in the serene beauty, and enjoy a hearty lunch. With your expert Travelxploria tour guide ensuring a seamless experience, continue to Jungfraujoch, the Top of Europe. From Grindelwald Terminal, board the state-of-the-art Eiger Express to Eigergletscher Station before switching to a cogwheel train that ascends to Europe’s highest railway station. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, carved entirely from ice, and take in spectacular views from the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. As the day concludes, return comfortably to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mt. Titlis Adventure & Lucerne Charm","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, embark on a breathtaking alpine adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and unforgettable experiences. Guided by our expert tour guide and representative, ascend to the majestic Mt. Titlis via a thrilling series of cable cars, including the world’s first rotating Rotair, offering stunning 360° views of the snow-capped Swiss Alps. Experience the adrenaline rush of walking across the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge. Later, explore the picturesque city of Lucerne, where you’ll visit the iconic Lion Monument and stroll along the historic Kapellbrücke. Your journey continues with a delightful visit to the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where you’ll indulge in the rich flavors of Switzerland’s finest chocolates. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch and dinner before returning to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a relaxing overnight stay.

Marvel at the city's most iconic landmark, the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, famous for its Gates of Paradise. Explore Piazza della Signoria, an open air museum adorned with Renaissance sculptures, and admire the Ponte Vecchio, the historic bridge spanning the River Arno. After a delightful breakfast, check out and journey to Rome, the Eternal City, with an experienced Travelxploria guide ensuring a seamless experience. As the best travel agency, we present an immersive tour of Vatican City, the world’s smallest country. Explore the magnificent St. Peter’s Basilica, the awe-inspiring Sistine Chapel, and Michelangelo’s masterpiece, The Last Judgement. Next, enjoy a delicious lunch before visiting the iconic Colosseum, followed by the legendary Trevi Fountain, where tossing a coin is said to ensure your return. Discover the Victor Emmanuel Monument and the Roman Forum. If Vatican Museum entry is unavailable due to the Jubilee year, our dedicated representative will arrange Colosseum entry instead. End the day with a delightful dinner and an overnight stay in Rome.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable 16-day European adventure that takes you through some of the continent's most iconic cities and cultural hubs. Begin your journey in the historic heart of Rome, exploring its ancient wonders before heading to the romantic canals of Venice. Continue on to the scenic beauty of Zurich, then immerse yourself in the timeless elegance of Paris, including a stop in the charming city of Rouen. Cross the Channel to experience the royal charm of London, and make your way through Colchester to the vibrant streets of Amsterdam, the Dutch capital. Conclude your grand tour with a visit to dynamic Berlin, blending rich history with modern energy, before departing with memories to last a lifetime.​

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

overview:
Best India to Italy Tour Package – Discover Art, History, and Romance

Beneath a sunlit sky streaked with history and la dolce vita, Italy unfolds as a canvas of timeless beauty—ancient ruins draped in vine-wrapped walls, cobalt seas crashing against pastel cliffs, and cobblestone lanes alive with opera echoes. The best India to Italy tour package begins here, blending culture, cuisine, and romance in every step. Guided by Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency, esteemed Best Tour Operator, and world-savvy Best International Tour Operator—each Italian reverie is choreographed to perfection. Opt for our Italy tour packages from India, elevate family adventures with the Best family tour packages, or entrust every romantic flourish to our Best honeymoon packages.

Why Choose an Italy Tour Package from India?

Rich Cultural Heritage and Timeless Architecture
From ancient Roman wonders to Renaissance masterpieces, Italy's heritage inspires awe. Our 7 days Italy tour package covers iconic landmarks from Rome to Florence with curated insights. Include local expert guides with background in art history to enhance your cultural immersion. For a broader European experience, explore our comprehensive India to Europe Tour package.

Direct Flights and Schengen Visa Assistance
Travelxploria’s Italy tour package from Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, and major cities includes complete visa support and flight arrangements. Add brief info about current visa processing timelines and trusted documentation tips to boost clarity.

Perfect for Honeymooners, Families, and History Enthusiasts
Whether you’re seeking India to Italy honeymoon tour package affordable options or planning a fun-filled family trip, our itineraries cater to every traveler. Explore romantic escapes in our honeymoon packages or plan memorable journeys with our tailored family tour packages.

Top India to Italy Tour Packages

7 to 10 Days Italy Tour Package from India – Rome, Venice, Florence & Milan
This best India to Italy tour package includes Rome’s historic sites, Venice’s canals, Florence’s art, and Milan’s modern edge. Ideal for first-time travelers. You could mention optional day trips to Pompeii or Lake Como.

Italy Honeymoon Packages for Indian Couples
Our India to Italy honeymoon tour package affordable plans feature romantic gondola rides, scenic countryside escapes, and couple-focused dining experiences. Consider including details like a spa experience in Tuscany or a candlelight dinner in Amalfi.

Budget-Friendly Italy Tour Packages from India
Explore affordable India to Italy tour package deals starting at INR 95,000 including major highlights, meals, and guided tours. Suggest budget tips such as using Italy’s regional trains and staying in boutique B&Bs. You may also want to see our solo travel packages for independent explorers.

Custom Italy Itineraries for Families and Group Tours
Flexible options such as Italy tour packages from Kolkata and Mumbai allow group-specific accommodations, child-friendly sightseeing, and cultural immersion. Include activity examples like gelato workshops or Roman gladiator school visits.

Must-Visit Places in Italy Covered in Tour Packages

Rome – Colosseum, Vatican City & Trevi Fountain
Our packages offer skip-the-line access to major landmarks, plus evening walking tours through Rome’s illuminated streets. Add museum highlights or special access features like Vatican early-entry tours.

Venice – Gondola Rides and Grand Canal
As part of our India to Italy tour package with Venice canal tour, enjoy a serene gondola experience under stone bridges and past grand Renaissance facades. Mention a specific Venice landmark like St. Mark's Basilica or the Rialto Bridge.

Florence – Renaissance Art and Architecture
Private access to the Uffizi Gallery and a guided tour of the Duomo await as part of the best India to Italy tour package. Suggest optional add-ons like artisan leather workshops or wine tasting in Chianti.

Milan – Fashion Capital and Duomo Cathedral
Take advantage of Milan’s blend of heritage and style with rooftop tours, La Scala visits, and shopping avenues. You might include a cultural tip about visiting Milan’s Brera Art Gallery or Navigli canals.

Pisa – Leaning Tower and Tuscan Countryside
Enjoy countryside picnics and wine tastings woven into your Italy tour package 5 days or longer. You could add that Pisa is often included as a day trip from Florence with convenient rail access.

What’s Included in the Best India to Italy Tour Packages?

Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
Packages including Italy tour packages from Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai, and Kolkata come with flights and airport transfers. Consider mentioning popular airline options for price and comfort.

Hotel Accommodation with Daily Breakfast
Stay in 3- to 5-star hotels with buffet breakfasts and scenic views. Add a tip on preferred neighborhoods in each city (e.g., Trastevere in Rome, Cannaregio in Venice).

Guided Tours, Entry Tickets & Inter-City Transfers
From Colosseum passes to Florence–Venice train tickets, we handle all logistics. Suggest the Eurail Pass or Italy’s high-speed train system for flexibility.

Schengen Visa Assistance and Travel Insurance
Visa help, insurance, and support documents included in every package. Recommend applying at least 4–6 weeks in advance to allow processing.

Best Time to Visit Italy from India

April to June – Ideal Weather and Fewer Crowds
Mild temperatures, spring blossoms, and cultural festivals abound. You might mention events like Rome’s birthday celebration or Florence’s Maggio Musicale.

September to October – Fall Colors and Wine Harvests
Stroll vineyards and dine al fresco in vibrant fall hues. Add tips for booking winery tours in Tuscany or Piedmont.

December to February – Winter Tours and Festive Atmosphere
Enjoy the best India to Italy winter tour package with Christmas markets, snowy Alps views, and cozy cafés. Mention Venice Carnival (Feb) or Rome's Piazza Navona market.

Frequently Asked Questions About India to Italy Tour Packages

How many days are ideal for an Italy trip from India?
We recommend a 7 days Italy tour package or a 10-day itinerary to comfortably explore key destinations. Mention if combining with another European country is feasible. Many travelers extend their trips with a norway tour package from india or a finland tour package from india.

Is a Schengen visa required for Indian travelers to Italy?
Yes. Our packages provide full support for Schengen visa applications. Consider providing a link or footnote to official embassy site.

What is the average cost of a tour package to Italy from India?
A 5 to 10-day Italy tour package cost ranges from INR 95,000 to INR 185,000, depending on customization and inclusions. Suggest budgeting tips like booking during shoulder season.

Do you offer India to Italy tour package with Venice canal tour?
Yes. This includes private gondola rides, historic walking tours, and canal-side dining as part of the romantic itinerary. Tip: Go for late evening rides for a quieter experience.

Can I book an India to Italy tour package with local cuisine experience?
Absolutely. Our packages include regional cooking classes, winery visits, and curated food tours across Florence, Tuscany, and Rome. Mention dietary accommodation options (vegetarian, Jain).

What is the best India to Italy winter tour package?
It includes Rome’s Christmas lights, Venice’s Carnival season, Alpine excursions, and cozy trattoria dinners in Tuscany. Consider adding info on Italy’s ski destinations (e.g., Cortina d'Ampezzo). For other European winter tours, consider our sweden tour packages from india or denmark tour package from india.

How to Book the Best India to Italy Tour Package

Top Indian Travel Agencies Offering Italy Packages
Travelxploria is your go-to provider for Italy tour packages from India with tailored service from cities like Kolkata, Delhi, Mumbai, and Bangalore. Include note on 24/7 support or WhatsApp assistance.

Online Booking Platforms and Early Bird Discounts
Take advantage of special deals when booking 60+ days in advance. Festive and off-season offers available. Mention refund/cancellation flexibility for peace of mind.

Required Documents and Travel Preparation Tips
Carry passport with 6-month validity, passport-sized photos, health insurance, and a universal adapter. Dress in layers and pack smart walking shoes. Suggest currency exchange options or eSIM cards.
For other fascinating destinations, check our uk tour packages from india, azerbaijan tour packages from india, or jordan tour packages from india for unique cultural journeys.
With Travelxploria’s best India to Italy tour package, live la dolce vita—whether you’re on a romantic escape, a family holiday, or a cultural deep dive. From Italy tour packages from Mumbai and Delhi to immersive Italy tour package 5 days and 7 days Italy tour package options, your Italian journey begins with us.
